legal.title: Important Legal Notice
legal.text: Medyra is an educational tool that explains medical terminology: it does not provide medical advice, diagnoses, or treatment recommendations. Always consult your licensed physician before making any health decisions. Your data is handled in compliance with GDPR and automatically deleted after 30 days.

prep.title: Doctor Visit Prep
prep.subtitle: Describe how you're feeling, in any language
prep.description: Write freely about your symptoms. We create a structured, professional German summary you can hand to your doctor.
prep.placeholder: Example: I've had a headache for 3 days, it gets worse in the morning. I feel dizzy when I stand up. I take metformin daily.
prep.hint: Mention: symptoms, when they started, medications, allergies, past conditions.
prep.charLimit: Text will be capped at {limit} characters.
prep.upgradeCta: Personal & Family plan: unlimited doctor summaries
prep.notSignedInDesc: You must be logged in to use the doctor visit prep.
prep.disclaimer: This document was created to help you communicate with your doctor. It is not a medical diagnosis.

prep.summariesWillAppear: Your generated doctor summaries will appear here

prep.catResultsDesc: Lab work, scans, or reports, understand what to ask

hero.badge: 3 free reports per month. No credit card needed.
hero.description: Upload any medical report or health document and get a plain-language explanation from AI in under 60 seconds. No medical degree required.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop any PDF, JPG, PNG or TXT. Our AI reads the text, even from scanned photos.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Claude AI identifies every test value, flags abnormal results, and writes a plain-language explanation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Read your results, chat with the AI for follow-up questions, and export a PDF for your next appointment.
howItWorks.cta: Start free, no credit card needed

doctorVisit.description: Describe how you feel in any language. Medyra turns it into a structured, professional German summary your doctor can read in seconds.
doctorVisit.step1Desc: Write freely in English, Arabic, Hindi, Turkish, whatever feels natural. No medical knowledge needed.
doctorVisit.step2Desc: Claude converts your description into a formal German clinical summary: chief complaints, timeline, history, and suggested questions.
doctorVisit.step3Desc: One click prints a clean A4 sheet with the Medyra header. Hand it to your doctor at the start of your visit.
doctorVisit.freePlan: Free plan includes 1 prep document per month
doctorVisit.disclaimer: This document does not constitute a medical diagnosis.

newToGermany.title: New to Germany?
newToGermany.subtitle: Health documents in Germany are written for Germans. Whether you just arrived or have been here for years, Medyra turns bureaucratic paperwork into plain language in your language.
newToGermany.trustLine: 3 free reports · No credit card needed · Results in under 60 seconds

security.title: Your data is encrypted, safe even from us
security.subtitle: Encrypted before it is stored. Deleted when you say so. That simple.
security.feat1Desc: Recommended by BSI TR-02102-1 for sensitive data
security.feat2Desc: Encryption required for personal health data (§9 BDSG)
security.feat3Desc: No two ciphertexts are alike, even for identical values
security.feat4Desc: Breach of our DB reveals nothing readable
security.deepDive: How does it work technically? Read the deep dive
security.flowStep3Sub: Temp decrypted, sent to Claude, not stored
security.promise1Desc: Everything is locked with bank grade encryption before it touches our database. Only your account can unlock it, not even we can.
security.promise2Title: You decide how long we keep it
security.promise2Desc: By default everything is deleted automatically after 30 days. Want to track trends? Choose to keep your history. Changed your mind? Delete everything instantly. Always your choice.
security.promise3Desc: Your report is analyzed once and the answer comes back to you. It is not stored by the AI provider and never used for training.

pricingCta.note: 3 free reports every month. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

senior.desc: Upload any Arztbrief, Befund, or discharge summary. Medyra explains it in plain language — read it yourself or have it read aloud. No tech skills needed.
senior.f1: No technical knowledge needed — just upload
senior.f3: Share with family with one-click PDF export
senior.f4: GDPR: your data is deleted after 30 days

beforeAfter.result1: Your thyroid (TSH) is within the normal range, no action needed.
beforeAfter.result2: Blood sugar (HbA1c) slightly elevated. Discuss pre-diabetes risk with your doctor.
beforeAfter.result3: Kidney filtration (eGFR) mildly reduced, worth monitoring over time.
beforeAfter.result4: Inflammation (CRP) elevated. Your doctor should investigate soon.
beforeAfter.result5: Iron stores (Ferritin) low. This may cause fatigue.

healthVault.subtitle: One account for the whole family. Medyra tracks biomarkers across reports over time and surfaces trends before your next appointment.
healthVault.feature1Desc: Create separate profiles for each family member, including partner, children, and elderly parents. Each has their own private health timeline.
healthVault.feature2Desc: Hemoglobin, ferritin, TSH, HbA1c, cholesterol, vitamin D, CRP, eGFR. Medyra reads them from every uploaded report and plots them automatically.
healthVault.feature3Title: Every value, not just the famous ones
healthVault.feature3Desc: Medyra tracks every numeric value from your reports, with your lab's own units and reference ranges. Nothing gets lost between appointments.
healthVault.feature4Desc: When you generate a doctor summary, select a profile. Your lab history is automatically pulled in. No typing, no forgetting, no gaps.

fairUse.label: Fair Use
fairUse.title: Fair Use Policy
fairUse.body: Paid plans include generous monthly soft limits that virtually no everyday user will ever reach. If you do hit one, that feature quietly pauses until the next month with no auto-upgrade.
fairUse.footnote: * Unlimited means no hard cap on reports. The soft limits above apply only to AI chat, prep summaries, and PDF exports.

languages.title: Available in 17 languages
languages.subtitle: Understand your health reports in your own language

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes: cancel from your dashboard at any time. No penalties, no questions asked. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
faq.q2: Is my health data stored securely?
faq.a2: All data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before touching our database. We are fully GDPR compliant and documents are automatically deleted after 30 days.
faq.a3: Paid plans have generous monthly soft limits. Personal: 200 chats, 30 preps, 50 PDFs. Family: 400 chats, 60 preps, 100 PDFs. If you hit a limit, you see a friendly message: no auto-upgrade.
faq.a4: PDF, JPG, PNG, and TXT files. Our AI can read text from scanned images and photos of lab reports, doctor letters, and prescriptions.
faq.q5: How does the Family plan work?
faq.a5: One subscription covers up to 5 family members, each with their own secure profile. The 50 monthly reports are shared across all members.
faq.q6: What is a doctor visit prep?
faq.a6: Medyra generates a structured summary of your symptoms and biomarker trends that you can share with your doctor before an appointment.
faq.a7: Medyra is powered by Claude AI, made by Anthropic. Claude processes your uploaded medical documents and generates the plain-language explanations you receive. Anthropic is listed as a data processor in our Privacy Policy.

appPage.title: Get the Medyra app
appPage.subtitle: Understand medical documents on your phone. Free to start, one account for web and mobile.
appPage.androidDesc: Download the app directly from us. Your phone may ask you to allow installs from the browser. That is normal for apps installed outside the Play Store and takes one tap.
appPage.androidStep2: Open the downloaded file and allow the installation
appPage.androidNote: The app is signed by us, talks only to medyra.de, and updates through this page.
appPage.iosDesc: On iPhone, Medyra installs straight from Safari as a web app. It gets its own icon on your home screen and works like a regular app.
appPage.iosNote: Same account, same reports, all features.
appPage.storesNote: Medyra is coming to the App Store and Google Play. Until then, this page is the official way to get the app.

valueChecker.disclaimer: General information based on standard adult reference ranges. Your lab may use different ranges; the range on your report applies. Not medical advice.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Medyra founders. Direct access for questions, feedback, partnerships, and support.
contact.heroSub: No ticket systems, no chatbots. Write to us directly. We read every message and reply personally.
contact.akashBio: Software engineer with a Master’s in Digital Health from the University of Potsdam and Hasso Plattner Institute.
contact.philippBio: Board certified Internist with over five years of clinical experience in Berlin hospitals.
contact.generalDesc: For billing, data privacy, GDPR requests, or press enquiries.

profiles.keepDataDesc: Your documents and lab history stay available any time, as your personal health archive. Everything is encrypted at rest. You can delete any document, or switch back, whenever you want.
profiles.autoDeleteDesc: Every document is permanently deleted 30 days after upload. Maximum privacy, nothing kept longer than needed.
profiles.privacyFooterNote: Your health data is encrypted with AES 256 before it is stored, so it is unreadable in the database. You can export or permanently delete everything at any time under GDPR. Changing this setting applies to all your existing documents immediately.
profiles.noComparisonData: No biomarker data yet. Upload reports assigned to these profiles to see comparison.
profiles.trackingSubtitleWithLimit: Tracking health data for {count} of {limit} profiles
profiles.upgradeSubtitle: Upgrade to Personal or Family to create health profiles
profiles.vaultDesc: Personal plans include 2 health profiles with longitudinal tracking, biomarker timelines, and AI-powered doctor summaries that pull from your medical history.
profiles.emptyDesc: Create your first health profile to start tracking biomarkers and building your medical history.
profiles.step1Desc: Add a profile for yourself or a family member with name and date of birth.
profiles.step2Desc: When uploading a health document, assign it to a profile. AI extracts biomarker values.
profiles.step3Desc: See biomarker trends, get AI delta analysis, and generate doctor-ready summaries from your history.
